TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cultural Club hya' ga pins'rux naha' kya sa London, England squw kawas sa 1981, gluw naha' ga:ppqwas ka Boy George, ptlubuw na gita' ga Roy Hay, ruw tlubuw Bass Mikey Craig aw' ruw ptucing tayko Jon Moss, wal naha' sybaziy kinbalay naha' cwanci' ga wal hmzinas 5000 mang kinpzyux kinbalay naha' CD, nanu' maki' qsahuy niya' uziy 700(pitu kbhong) mang kinbalay naha' CD te Amirika. nanu' quw kinmtkknayril iyal pin'knayril nquw ppqwas naha' ka Boy George quw spzyang syun inlungan kwara' na squliq. Nanu' squw kawas sa 1984 ga wal magal qnabu' naha' ka Grammy Award bniq naha' sa pzyang blaq balay na giqas na hayyo, ruw pzyang blaq balay qnabu' naha' kya kwara' British Music Awards: pzyang blaq balay gluw na p'unggak, pzyang balay blaq na kmnbalay sa pintbuci' na qwas sazing qnabu' qaniy. mtgagay sa kawas tay 1986 laha', nanu' quw ppqwas hya' lga musa' magDJ squw p'lhaw kska' bzngi', ruw magal lawziy binkgan naha' sa zasi' na DJ sa binkgan sa kbhul hi' na DJ kya United Kingdom, babaw niya' lga t'aring kbalay lawziy p'unggak kya sa kawas tay 1999. wal naha' hawhunquw aki' naha' s'usa' pzyugi' zensekkay sa kawas tay 2014 lga, t'aring lawziy mwah zyungkay pzyugi' sa kawas qaniy lawziy, pinzyugi' naha' sa msmisuw qaniy hya' ga byacing tay 12 squw singgaboyo'!.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨultural ʦ~ʨluβ ħjaʔ ɣa pins~ɕʔrux naħaʔ kja s~ɕa lon*on, eŋlan* s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ s~ɕa ****, ɣluw naħaʔ ɣa:ppqwas~ɕ ka βoj ɣeorɣe, ptluβuw na ɣitaʔ ɣa roj ħaj, ruw tluβuw βas~ɕs~ɕ mikej ʦ~ʨraiɣ awʔ ruw ptuʦ~ʨiŋ tajko *on mos~ɕs~ɕ, wal naħaʔ s~ɕjβazij kinβalaj naħaʔ ʦ~ʨwanʦ~ʨiʔ ɣa wal ħmzinas~ɕ **** maŋ kinpzjux kinβalaj naħaʔ ʦ~ʨ*, nanuʔ makiʔ qs~ɕaħuj nijaʔ uzij ***(pitu kβħoŋ) maŋ kinβalaj naħaʔ ʦ~ʨ* te amirika. nanuʔ quw kinmtkknajril ijal pinʔknajril nquw ppqwas~ɕ naħaʔ ka βoj ɣeorɣe quw s~ɕpzjaŋ s~ɕjun inluŋan kwaraʔ na s~ɕquliq. nanuʔ s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ s~ɕa **** ɣa wal maɣal qnaβuʔ naħaʔ ka ɣrammj awar* βniq naħaʔ s~ɕa pzjaŋ βlaq βalaj na ɣiqas~ɕ na ħajjo, ruw pzjaŋ βlaq βalaj qnaβuʔ naħaʔ kja kwaraʔ βritis~ɕħ mus~ɕiʦ~ʨ awar*s~ɕ: pzjaŋ βlaq βalaj ɣluw na pʔuŋɣak, pzjaŋ βalaj βlaq na kmnβalaj s~ɕa pintβuʦ~ʨiʔ na qwas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ qnaβuʔ qanij. mtɣaɣaj s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj **** laħaʔ, nanuʔ quw ppqwas~ɕ ħjaʔ lɣa mus~ɕaʔ maɣ** s~ɕquw pʔlħaw ks~ɕkaʔ βzŋiʔ, ruw maɣal lawzij βinkɣan naħaʔ s~ɕa zas~ɕiʔ na ** s~ɕa βinkɣan s~ɕa kβħul ħiʔ na ** kja unite* kiŋ*om, βaβaw nijaʔ lɣa tʔariŋ kβalaj lawzij pʔuŋɣak kja s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****. wal naħaʔ ħawħunquw akiʔ naħaʔ s~ɕʔus~ɕaʔ pzjuɣiʔ zens~ɕekkaj s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj **** lɣa, tʔariŋ lawzij mwaħ zjuŋkaj pzjuɣiʔ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ qanij lawzij, pinzjuɣiʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa ms~ɕmis~ɕuw qanij ħjaʔ ɣa βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕquw s~ɕiŋɣaβojoʔ!.
S.FORM: Cultural Club hya' ga pins'rux naha' kya sa London, England squw kawas sa 1981, gluw naha' ga:ppqwas ka Boy George, ptlubuw na gita' ga Roy Hay, ruw tlubuw Bass Mikey Craig aw' ruw ptucing tayko Jon Moss, wal naha' sybaziy kinbalay naha' cwanci' ga wal hmzinas 5000 mang kinpzyux kinbalay naha' CD, nanu' maki' qsahuy niya' uziy 700(pitu kbhong) mang kinbalay naha' CD te Amirika. nanu' quw kinmtkknayril iyal pin'knayril nquw ppqwas naha' ka Boy George quw spzyang syun inlungan kwara' na squliq. Nanu' squw kawas sa 1984 ga wal magal qnabu' naha' ka Grammy Award bniq naha' sa pzyang blaq balay na giqas na hayyo, ruw pzyang blaq balay qnabu' naha' kya kwara' British Music Awards: pzyang blaq balay gluw na p'unggak, pzyang balay blaq na kmnbalay sa pintbuci' na qwas sazing qnabu' qaniy. mtgagay sa kawas tay 1986 laha', nanu' quw ppqwas hya' lga musa' magDJ squw p'lhaw kska' bzngi', ruw magal lawziy binkgan naha' sa zasi' na DJ sa binkgan sa kbhul hi' na DJ kya United Kingdom, babaw niya' lga t'aring kbalay lawziy p'unggak kya sa kawas tay 1999. wal naha' hawhunquw aki' naha' s'usa' pzyugi' zensekkay sa kawas tay 2014 lga, t'aring lawziy mwah zyungkay pzyugi' sa kawas qaniy lawziy, pinzyugi' naha' sa msmisuw qaniy hya' ga byacing tay 12 squw singgaboyo'!.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨultural ʦ~ʨluβ ħjaʔ ɣa pins~ɕʔrux naħaʔ kja s~ɕa lon*on, eŋlan* s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ s~ɕa ****, ɣluw naħaʔ ɣa:ppqwas~ɕ ka βoj ɣeorɣe, ptluβuw na ɣitaʔ ɣa roj ħaj, ruw tluβuw βas~ɕs~ɕ mikej ʦ~ʨraiɣ awʔ ruw ptuʦ~ʨiŋ tajko *on mos~ɕs~ɕ, wal naħaʔ s~ɕjβazij kinβalaj naħaʔ ʦ~ʨwanʦ~ʨiʔ ɣa wal ħmzinas~ɕ **** maŋ kinpzjux kinβalaj naħaʔ ʦ~ʨ*, nanuʔ makiʔ qs~ɕaħuj nijaʔ uzij ***(pitu kβħoŋ) maŋ kinβalaj naħaʔ ʦ~ʨ* te amirika. nanuʔ quw kinmtkknajril ijal pinʔknajril nquw ppqwas~ɕ naħaʔ ka βoj ɣeorɣe quw s~ɕpzjaŋ s~ɕjun inluŋan kwaraʔ na s~ɕquliq. nanuʔ s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ s~ɕa **** ɣa wal maɣal qnaβuʔ naħaʔ ka ɣrammj awar* βniq naħaʔ s~ɕa pzjaŋ βlaq βalaj na ɣiqas~ɕ na ħajjo, ruw pzjaŋ βlaq βalaj qnaβuʔ naħaʔ kja kwaraʔ βritis~ɕħ mus~ɕiʦ~ʨ awar*s~ɕ: pzjaŋ βlaq βalaj ɣluw na pʔuŋɣak, pzjaŋ βalaj βlaq na kmnβalaj s~ɕa pintβuʦ~ʨiʔ na qwas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ qnaβuʔ qanij. mtɣaɣaj s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj **** laħaʔ, nanuʔ quw ppqwas~ɕ ħjaʔ lɣa mus~ɕaʔ maɣ** s~ɕquw pʔlħaw ks~ɕkaʔ βzŋiʔ, ruw maɣal lawzij βinkɣan naħaʔ s~ɕa zas~ɕiʔ na ** s~ɕa βinkɣan s~ɕa kβħul ħiʔ na ** kja unite* kiŋ*om, βaβaw nijaʔ lɣa tʔariŋ kβalaj lawzij pʔuŋɣak kja s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****. wal naħaʔ ħawħunquw akiʔ naħaʔ s~ɕʔus~ɕaʔ pzjuɣiʔ zens~ɕekkaj s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj **** lɣa, tʔariŋ lawzij mwaħ zjuŋkaj pzjuɣiʔ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ qanij lawzij, pinzjuɣiʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa ms~ɕmis~ɕuw qanij ħjaʔ ɣa βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕquw s~ɕiŋɣaβojoʔ!.
